revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''瑜伽大権現'''、'''由加大権現'''（ゆがだいごんげん） *[[瑜伽大権現]] - [[阿弥陀如来]]・[[薬師如来]]を[[本地仏]]とす...'
revision.text:
'''瑜伽大権現'''、'''由加大権現'''（ゆがだいごんげん）
*[[瑜伽大権現]] - [[阿弥陀如来]]・[[薬師如来]]を[[本地仏]]とする[[神仏習合]]の神。 **[[由加山]]の別名、もしくは下記2寺社の総称。上記を祀る。 ***[[蓮台寺]]の別名、および祭神。 ***[[由加神社本宮]]およびその分社の別名、および祭神。 *[[由加大権現 (浅口市)]] - [[岡山県]][[浅口市]][[鴨方町]]にある神社。 *[[由加大権現 (神石高原町)]] - [[広島県]][[神石郡]][[神石高原町]]にある神社。 *[[由加大権現 (尾道市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *[[由加大権現 (三原市)]] - 広島県[[三原市]]にある神社。 *[[由加大権現 (竹原市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *[[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]にある神社。 *[[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]にある神社。市内に同名神社が2社ある。 *[[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市にある神社。
==関連項目== *[[由加神社]]
{{aimai}}

==関連項目== *[[由加神社]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ゆかたいこんけん}}

*[[瑜伽大権現]] - [[阿弥陀如来]]・[[薬師如来]]を[[本地仏]]とする[[神仏習合]]の神。 *[[由加山]]の別名、もしくは下記2寺社の総称。上記を祀る。 **[[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|蓮台寺]]の別名、および祭神。 **[[由加神社本宮]]および以下の分社の別名、および祭神。 ***[[由加大権現 (浅口市)]] - [[岡山県]][[浅口市]][[鴨方町]]にある神社。 ***[[由加大権現 (神石高原町)]] - [[広島県]][[神石郡]][[神石高原町]]にある神社。 ***[[由加大権現 (尾道市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 ***[[由加大権現 (三原市)]] - 広島県[[三原市]]にある神社。 ***[[由加大権現 (竹原市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 ***[[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]にある神社。 ***[[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]にある神社。市内に同名神社が2社ある。<!--2社の詳細鎮座地求む--> ***[[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市にある神社。
==関連項目== *[[由加神社]]

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga-san|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendai-ji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
==See Also== *[[Yuga Shrine (disambiguation)]]

* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendai-ji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
==See Also== *[[Yuga Shrine (disambiguation)]]

revision.text:
'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
==See Also== *[[Yuga Shrine (disambiguation)]]

* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.

'''瑜伽大権現'''、'''由加大権現'''（ゆがだいごんげん）
* [[瑜伽大権現]] - [[阿弥陀如来]]・[[薬師如来]]を[[本地仏]]とする[[神仏習合]]の神。 * [[由加山]]の別名、もしくは下記2寺社の総称。上記を祀る。 ** [[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|蓮台寺]]の別名、および祭神。 ** [[由加神社本宮]]および以下の分社の別名、および祭神。 *** [[由加大権現 (浅口市)]] - [[岡山県]][[浅口市]][[鴨方町]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (神石高原町)]] - [[広島県]][[神石郡]][[神石高原町]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (尾道市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (三原市)]] - 広島県[[三原市]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (竹原市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *** [[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]にある神社。
== 関連項目 == * [[由加神社]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ゆかたいこんけん}} [[Category:瑜伽信仰]] [[Category:権現]]

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
==See Also== *[[Yuga Shrine (disambiguation)]]

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
==See Also== *[[Yuga Shrine (disambiguation)]]

'''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} – A deity in {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|ja|神仏習合}} (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with {{ill|Amida Nyorai|ja|阿弥陀如来}} (Amitābha) and {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}} (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its {{ill|Honjibutsu|ja|本地仏}} (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)}} – Located in {{ill|Asakuchi, Okayama|ja|浅口市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, in {{ill|Kamogata|ja|鴨方町}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)}} – Located in {{ill|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima|ja|神石高原町}}, {{ill|Jinseki District|ja|神石郡}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)}} – Located in {{ill|Onomichi, Hiroshima|ja|尾道市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Mihara, Hiroshima|ja|三原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takehara, Hiroshima|ja|竹原市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima, Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.

revision.text:
'''瑜伽大権現'''、'''由加大権現'''（ゆがだいごんげん）
* [[瑜伽大権現]] - [[阿弥陀如来]]・[[薬師如来]]を[[本地仏]]とする[[神仏習合]]の神。 * [[由加山]]の別名、もしくは下記2寺社の総称。上記を祀る。 ** [[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|蓮台寺]]の別名、および祭神。 ** [[由加神社本宮]]および以下の分社の別名、および祭神。 *** [[由加大権現 (浅口市)]] - [[岡山県]][[浅口市]][[鴨方町]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (神石高原町)]] - [[広島県]][[神石郡]][[神石高原町]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (尾道市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (三原市)]] - 広島県[[三原市]]にある神社。 *** [[由加大権現 (竹原市)]] - 広島県[[尾道市]]にある神社。 *** [[瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]にある神社。
== 関連項目 == * [[由加神社]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ゆかたいこんけん}} [[Category:瑜伽信仰]] [[Category:権現]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11573854]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yuga Daigongen''' (瑜伽大権現, 由加大権現)
* {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen|qq=}} – A deity in [[:en:Shinbutsu-shūgō|Shinbutsu-shūgō]] (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), with [[:en:Amitābha|Amida Nyorai]] (Amitābha) and [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Yakushi Nyorai Medicine Buddha]] (Bhaiṣajyaguru) as its [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] (original Buddhist counterparts). * An alternate name for {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Mountain|qq=}} or a collective name for the two shrines below, which enshrine the above deity. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yugasan Rendaiji|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yugasan Rendaiji|qq=}}. ** An alternate name and enshrined deity of {{ill|Yuga Shrine|lt=Yuga Shrine|lt=Yuga Shrine Hongū|ja|由加神社本宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine Hongū|qq=}} and its affiliated branch shrines: *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja|由加大権現 (浅口市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Asakuchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Asakuchi|Asakuchi, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], in [[:en:Kamogata, Okayama|Kamogata]]. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja|由加大権現 (神石高原町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Jinseki Kōgen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Jinsekikōgen, Hiroshima|Jinseki Kōgen, Hiroshima]], [[:en:Jinseki District, Hiroshima|Jinseki District]], [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]]. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja|由加大権現 (尾道市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Onomichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Onomichi|Onomichi, Hiroshima]], Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja|由加大権現 (三原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Mihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Mihara, Hiroshima|Mihara, Hiroshima]], Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja|由加大権現 (竹原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Takehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Takehara, Hiroshima|Takehara, Hiroshima]], Hiroshima Prefecture. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima, Tokushima]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. *** {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (Tokushima, second shrine)|qq=}} – A second shrine of the same name within Tokushima City. *** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daibosatsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – A shrine in Tokushima City.
